name: Spinach Turkey and Fettuccine Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces uncooked fettuccine, broken into 3-inch pieces
1 1/2 cups cubed oven roasted turkey breast
3 cups fresh spinach, in 3 sets of 1/4-inch strips
1/2 cup low fat cucumber ranch salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook fettuccine in boiling salted water as directed on the package.
2. Drain and rinse with cold water.
3. In a large bowl, combine cooked fettuccine, turkey, and spinach.
4. In a small bowl, combine yogurt and salad dressing.
5. Mix well.
6. Pour over spinach mixture.
7. Toss gently.
8. Serve immediately on lettuce leaf lined plates, if desired.
